I found your dentist appointment in your calendar:

- Title: Dentist Appointment  
- When: 2024-05-18, 09:00–10:00  
- Location: Downtown Dental Clinic  
- Event ID: 5

How would you like me to reschedule it? Please tell me one of the following:

- New start time and end time in this format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM (e.g., 2024-05-22 11:00 to 2024-05-22 12:00), or  
- A new start time only (I will keep the same 1‑hour duration), or  
- A date range and preferred time of day (e.g., "any morning next week"), and I can propose specific slots.

Also tell me:
- Do you want me to notify the clinic (I can add a clinic email if you provide it) or just update your calendar event?  
- Any other constraints (no mornings, only weekdays, etc.)?

Once you confirm the new time (and notification preference), I’ll reschedule it.
